title: Passive Skill Tree
subtitle: 200+ allocatable nodes to customize your character's stats and elemental damage profile.
interactiveHint: Pan with drag, zoom with scroll/pinch. Click a node to allocate it. Start by clicking a class emblem start node.
minorDesc: Small percentage bonuses to individual stats. These form the backbone of your build, providing incremental improvements like +5% Damage, +3% Crit Chance, or +20 flat HP.
notableDesc: Larger stat bonuses and often multi-stat nodes. Notable nodes provide meaningful power spikes, such as +12% Damage + 3% Crit, or significant flat HP gains.
keystoneDesc: Powerful build-defining nodes that fundamentally change how your character plays. These include elemental damage conversions, massive stat boosts, and unique mechanics.
modifiersSub: Each node carries one or more stat modifiers. Modifiers can be percentage-based or flat additions.
dmgDesc: Increases Bugei tap damage by percentage
hpDesc: Adds flat HP or increases max HP by percentage
critMultDesc: Increases Bugei critical hit damage multiplier
dodgeDesc: Chance to completely avoid incoming hits
fireDesc: Converts portion of damage to fire element
lightningDesc: Converts portion of damage to lightning element
coldDesc: Converts portion of damage to cold element
alloc1: Allocate points as you level up (1 point per level)
alloc2: Nodes must be connected to an already allocated node
alloc3: Max 6 class-specific skill nodes per character
alloc4: Full reset available at any time (costs 100 gold per node)
stackDesc: All percentage bonuses from your allocated nodes combine together and scale your base stats. Flat bonuses are added on top of that. The more nodes you invest in one stat, the stronger the effect.
